across.clue: The possibility that something will happen especially something good.
When something is chronic, it happens over and over again for a long time.
A recipe is a set of instructions for cooking a certain type of food.
Political means relating to government or politics.
An angle is the direction from which something is looked at.
Hospitality is friendly behavior and entertainment, shown to guests or strangers.
A curriculum is the set of courses offered by a school.
A new idea method piece of equipment etc.
Frost is a white layer of ice that forms during very cold weather.
If something centres around someone or something, they are its main subject of attention. | ___ around
To assimilate is to adopt the ways of a new culture and fully become a part of it.
If something is premature, then it is done too early or before the proper time.

down.clue: Arthritis is an illness causing pain and swelling in a person’s joints.
to become or make something smaller in size.
A medal is a small piece of metal given as an award.
To personalize something means to design it to meet a person’s unique needs.
Horror is a feeling of being very afraid or shocked.
Nonsense are words or ideas that are silly or foolish.
A casual thing is relaxed or simple.
If a place is arid, then it is hot and dry and gets very little or no rain.
